title: Neuromon - A Cobblemon Add-on
description: A Cobblemon side mod that adds fakemon based on Neuro-sama and Evil Neuro, as well as related characters and V-Tubers.
body:
An addon for the Pokémon mod called Cobblemon, created as a mod to implement additional features beyond simply adding Fakemon, such as custom evolution requirements, new items, and minor procedural animations. ## Included species: - Studysama - Neuroplushie - Evilplushie - Neurosama - Evilneuro - Vedal - Gymbag - Staz
Evolutions ![evolutions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4eeaf8d7a164834bd8218b585f99cc9f27b18bc6.png) ### Custom evolution requirement added by the mod - **Use a move while holding an item.** Within an unlimited number of battles, the Pokémon must use a specific move a set number of times while holding a designated item. Similar to the evolution condition for Primeape into Annihilape, but with an added held item requirement. - **Defeat opponents while holding an item.** Within an unlimited number of battles, the Pokémon must faint an opponent Pokémon a set number of times while holding a designated item. Similar to the evolution condition for Bisharp into Kingambit, but in this case, a specific item must be held by the player's Pokémon.
Items ### Held items - **Heart Transmitter** An item to be held by a Pokémon. It's a cute-looking microphone with a small bow that boosts the power of the holder's sound-based moves. ![Heart Transmitter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d719f32496a2e1f69b3f5e87565e23c6c3254ca7.png) - **Baleful Harpoon** An item to be held by a Pokémon. A creepy black harpoon with a rope and a red wool decoration that boosts the power of holder's moves used against Water-type Pokémon. ![Baleful Harpoon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9d39ac309032067b51bc7c7f1d768fb09fe00901.png)
